# GO Design, Inc.

> GO Design is a Chicago-based UI/UX design agency founded by Timothy McGuire, specializing in AI and agentic experience design, SaaS product design, marketing web design, and fractional design services. With 12+ years of experience, GO Design transforms digital products for enterprise and startup clients nationwide.

## About

GO Design, Inc. is a professional UI/UX design agency headquartered in Chicago, Illinois. Founded by Timothy McGuire, the agency brings over 12 years of experience in user-centered design to every project. GO Design serves clients across the United States, from startups building their first product to Fortune 500 enterprises optimizing complex workflows.

## Services

### UI/UX Design Consulting
Full-spectrum UX/UI design consulting including user flows, information architecture, design systems, wireframing, prototyping, and heuristic analysis. GO Design's process is rooted in user research and data-driven decision making.

### SaaS Product Design
End-to-end design for SaaS applications: user research, strategic thinking, design system creation, workflow optimization, and scalable interface design. Focused on driving user engagement, retention, and business growth.

### AI & Agentic Experience Design
Director-level UX strategy and design for teams shipping AI-powered products. Built around the Trust-by-Design framework (predictability, transparency, control, accountability) and mental model mapping. Capabilities include AI/AX strategy and assessment, AI product design sprints, fractional AI design leadership, interaction pattern design (copilot, agent, classifier, advisor), and responsible AI workshops. Recent engagements include Euphonic AI (brand and interface design for an AI-led SaaS product, 2024) and ZS (agentic AI experience strategy and design system evaluation, 2026).

### Mobile App Design
Mobile-first design for iOS and Android platforms. Intuitive user experiences with multi-device optimization, responsive layouts, and beautiful interfaces that drive engagement.

### Marketing Web Design
High-converting marketing websites and landing pages with compelling storytelling, brand alignment, and conversion optimization. Featured projects include work for Aramark, Chrysler, and Accenture.

### Fractional SaaS Designer
Senior-level UI/UX design expertise available on a part-time, fractional basis. Services include design system evolution, workflow redesign, UI modernization, information architecture mapping, and AI-ready design foundations. Ideal for SaaS teams needing senior design perspective without full-time overhead.

### Experience Research
User research capabilities including competitive analysis, user testing, persona development, heuristic analysis, and journey mapping.

### Brand & Identity Design
Complete brand identity design including logo creation, color system definition, typography selection, and comprehensive brand guidelines.

## Notable Case Studies

### CoreTechs Healthcare SaaS
Redesigned a healthcare SaaS platform for data-driven patient management. Delivered intuitive interfaces for value-based care, contract optimization, population risk management, and performance analytics.

### Accenture Employee Onboarding
Redesigned the employee onboarding experience for 500,000+ global Accenture employees. Streamlined pre-boarding journeys, created intuitive task navigation, and implemented accessible design systems that measurably improved new hire confidence.

### Jim Beam Cocktail Project
Created a mobile-first cocktail recipe discovery platform for Suntory Lab and Jim Beam. Designed trending content rails, contextual CTAs, recipe save/share/print functionality, and a responsive web experience.
